generated_exposure.exposure_text: 🚨 New security measures are being debated in Congress, and it's crucial we get this right. While some worry about civil liberties, the truth is our current systems are outdated and leave families vulnerable. Just last year, local authorities were unable to act quickly enough to prevent a tragic incident in Ohio because of bureaucratic red tape. We can't afford to wait any longer. Stronger domestic security powers would give our heroes the tools they need to keep us safe, while still protecting our rights. #SafetyFirst #SecureOurFuture
